hero.title: Nébula Sur: multiservices for companies and individuals.
hero.subtitle: AI, automation, digitalization, electrical work, IT maintenance, and professional cleaning through one service network.
hero.description: We combine technology solutions and operational services: on-site work such as electrical jobs, cleaning, or physical maintenance is handled locally, while remote services such as AI, automation, digitalization, training, and consulting are available across Spain.

gymTracker.title: Gym Tracker (AppGYM)
gymTracker.description: Gym Tracker (AppGYM) is a PWA that tracks nutrition, workouts, and body metrics to calculate energy balance and body composition progress. It also uses AI to analyze habits and provide personalized recommendations to improve performance and composition.
details: 📊 Nutrition tracking: log meals, calories, and macros
🏋️ Workout control: routines, exercises, and progress
⚖️ Energy balance: TDEE plus deficit/surplus calculation
🤖 AI assistance: recommendations, analysis, and contextual help
📈 History and metrics: weight, habits, and performance evolution
📱 PWA format: works as an installable app from the browser

process.title: A practical model: from diagnosis to intervention

steps.title: Diagnosis and scope
steps.description: We gather needs, constraints, and objectives to define which service fits and what priority it has.

steps.title: Proposal and planning
steps.description: We organize tasks, timing, materials, or required resources and align expectations before execution.

steps.title: Coordinated execution
steps.description: We intervene with a clear sequence, direct communication, and progress control.

steps.title: Follow-up and improvement
steps.description: We review the outcome, adjust pending points, and leave recommendations for maintenance or next steps.

items.title: Safety and responsibility
items.description: We work with attention to risks, access, installations, data, and real conditions of each environment.

items.title: Traceable delivery
items.description: Each intervention is framed with clear scope, follow-up, and visible communication for the client.

items.title: Maintainable solutions
items.description: We prioritize improvements that can be operated, reviewed, and expanded without rebuilding from scratch.

items.title: Close support
items.description: We provide practical guidance so companies and individuals understand the outcome and next care steps.

areas.title: Local services in Granada and Malaga, and remote digital services across Spain
areas.subtitle: Work that requires physical presence, such as electrical jobs, cleaning, or maintenance of installations and equipment, is handled locally. Training, consulting, AI, automation, digitalization, and anything viable at distance is delivered remotely for clients across Spain.

locations.name: Local on-site services
locations.description: Electrical work, professional cleaning, inspections, installation maintenance, and physical equipment support are coordinated in Granada, Malaga, and nearby areas depending on availability.
services: Electrical work for homes, businesses, and communities
Professional cleaning for offices, premises, and workspaces
On-site support for equipment and installations

locations.name: Remote services across Spain
locations.description: Consulting, training, applied AI, automation, digitalization, and technical support that does not require physical presence is delivered online for clients anywhere in Spain.
services: Training and adoption of digital tools

faqs.question: Which services are local and which can be done remotely?
faqs.answer: Electrical work, cleaning, physical maintenance, and jobs that require travel are handled locally. AI, automation, digitalization, training, consulting, and operational audits can be delivered remotely for clients across Spain.

faqs.question: Do you work with clients outside Granada and Malaga?
faqs.answer: Yes. Anything that can be solved online is available across Spain: diagnosis, consulting, training, automations, documentation, follow-up, and remote technical support.

faqs.question: Do you handle small projects or only companies?
faqs.answer: We work with companies, self-employed professionals, communities, and individuals. We first define the scope and then propose an intervention matched to the real need.

contact.title: Contact
